WARFRAMEMOD-BLIND_RAGE.title: Blind Rage
WARFRAMEMOD-BLIND_RAGE.description: This card deals an additional [blue]{Increment}%[/blue]damage. When you play this card, lose {Energy:energyIcons()}.
WARFRAMEMOD-DEPLETED_RELOAD.title: Depleted Reload
WARFRAMEMOD-DEPLETED_RELOAD.description: When you play this card, discard [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}. Next turn, draw [blue]{Increment}[/blue] {Increment:plural:card|cards}.
WARFRAMEMOD-HEAVY_CALIBER.title: Heavy Caliber
WARFRAMEMOD-HEAVY_CALIBER.description: This card deals an additional [blue]{Increment}%[/blue] damage. This card targets a random enemy.
WARFRAMEMOD-HEAVY_CALIBER.extraCardText: This card targets a random enemy.
WARFRAMEMOD-NARROW_MINDED.title: Narrow Minded
WARFRAMEMOD-NARROW_MINDED.description: When you play this card, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. This card has [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-OVEREXTENDED.title: Overextended
WARFRAMEMOD-OVEREXTENDED.description: When you play this card, play an extra against ALL remaining enemies. This card deals [blue]{Decrement}%[/blue] less damage.
WARFRAMEMOD-OVEREXTENDED.extraCardText: Play an extra against ALL remaining enemies.
WARFRAMEMOD-TAINTED_MAG.title: Tainted Mag
WARFRAMEMOD-TAINTED_MAG.description: When you play this card, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}. Draw [blue]{Decrement}[/blue] less {Decrement:plural:card|cards} next turn.
